---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a broken or unexpected behavior in the showcase website
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include screenshots or screen recordings if helpful.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 125, Safari 17 |
| OS | e.g. macOS 15, Windows 11 |
| Viewport | e.g. 1440px desktop, 375px mobile |
| Section affected | e.g. Creator Brands, Trust & IP, Hero |

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem. If you see a console error, paste it here.

```
(paste console error here if applicable)
```
